feed.title: unique_ptr<T> </T>
feed.subtitle: Write an awesome description for your new site here. You can edit this line in _config.yml. It will appear in your document head meta (for Google search results) and in your feed.xml site description.

entry.title: Welcome to Jekyll!
entry.content:
You’ll find this post in your _posts directory. Go ahead and edit it and re-build the site to see your changes. You can rebuild the site in many different ways, but the most common way is to run jekyll serve, which launches a web server and auto-regenerates your site when a file is updated.

To add new posts, simply add a file in the _posts directory that follows the convention YYYY-MM-DD-name-of-post.ext and includes the necessary front matter. Take a look at the source for this post to get an idea about how it works.

Jekyll also offers powerful support for code snippets:

Check out the Jekyll docs for more info on how to get the most out of Jekyll. File all bugs/feature requests at Jekyll’s GitHub repo. If you have questions, you can ask them on Jekyll Talk.
entry.summary: You’ll find this post in your _posts directory. Go ahead and edit it and re-build the site to see your changes. You can rebuild the site in many different ways, but the most common way is to run jekyll serve, which launches a web server and auto-regenerates your site when a file is updated.

entry.title: Fringe Black Panther
entry.content: Sitting here watching Fringe and forgot that Chadwick Boseman (Black Panther) was in the episode Subject 9.
entry.summary: Sitting here watching Fringe and forgot that Chadwick Boseman (Black Panther) was in the episode Subject 9.

entry.title: Playing
entry.content: Time to watch all the kids play. Love hearing everyone from elementary to high school.
entry.summary: Time to watch all the kids play. Love hearing everyone from elementary to high school.

entry.title: Life is a TRAP
entry.content:
I don’t like to talk much about politics (although this shouldn’t be political): I just don’t understand how so many people can be pro-life then once that person is born, they are on their own. In many states, abortions have a 3 day waiting period (WTF?) where you can get a gun and kill 17 kids whenever you want. Where is the protection for them? Most laws for waiting periods on guns are applied to handguns, not shotguns or rifles. Where are the TRAP laws for all guns?

Abortion Laws: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
entry.summary: I don’t like to talk much about politics (although this shouldn’t be political): I just don’t understand how so many people can be pro-life then once that person is born, they are on their own. In many states, abortions have a 3 day waiting period (WTF?) where you can get a gun and kill 17 kids whenever you want. Where is the protection for them? Most laws for waiting periods on guns are applied to handguns, not shotguns or rifles. Where are the TRAP laws for all guns?

entry.title: Life is a Rough Sport
entry.content: Days like these the phrase “Life is a rough sport” really rings true.
entry.summary: Days like these the phrase “Life is a rough sport” really rings true.

entry.title: Grey and Rainy
entry.content: After living in the Northwest for many years, you would think I was used to the grey and rainy days. Nope… hate them.
entry.summary: After living in the Northwest for many years, you would think I was used to the grey and rainy days. Nope… hate them.

entry.title: Tetris Board
entry.content: I will no longer refer to it as “My Calendar” and now refer to it as “My Tetris Board”.
entry.summary: I will no longer refer to it as “My Calendar” and now refer to it as “My Tetris Board”.
